languages.text: "Проклятая ищейка. Нюх у него, что ли, особенный?" {n}Меровец зло цыкает зубом.{/n} "Ну и в бездну его".
"Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."
languages.original_text: "Проклятая ищейка. Нюх у него, что ли, особенный?" {n}Меровец зло цыкает зубом.{/n} "Ну и в бездну его".

traits.locale_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."
"Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."
"Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."

languages.text: «Maldito sabueso. ¿Es que huele las intrigas a lo lejos?». {n}El meroviano chasquea la lengua, irritado.{/n} «Bueno, al vacío con él».
languages.original_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."

traits.locale_text: «Maldito sabueso. ¿Es que huele las intrigas a lo lejos?». {n}El meroviano chasquea la lengua, irritado.{/n} «Bueno, al vacío con él».

languages.text: “可恶的猎犬。隔着二十步都能闻出猫腻来不成？”{n}这位梅罗夫人烦躁地咂了咂嘴。{/n}“行，那他就见虚空去吧。”
languages.original_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."

traits.locale_text: “可恶的猎犬。隔着二十步都能闻出猫腻来不成？”{n}这位梅罗夫人烦躁地咂了咂嘴。{/n}“行，那他就见虚空去吧。”

languages.text: « Sale chien. À croire qu'il est capable de flairer une entourloupe à vingt pas, le bougre ! » {n}Le Merovien fait claquer sa langue d'un air contrarié.{/n} « Bah, que le vide l'emporte. »
languages.original_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."

traits.locale_text: « Sale chien. À croire qu'il est capable de flairer une entourloupe à vingt pas, le bougre ! » {n}Le Merovien fait claquer sa langue d'un air contrarié.{/n} « Bah, que le vide l'emporte. »

languages.text: "Kan tazısına bak. Yirmi adım öteden dümen kokusu alıp gelmiş." {n}Merovlu, sinirle dilini şaklatıyor.{/n} "Uçsuza kadar yolu var."
languages.original_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."

traits.locale_text: "Kan tazısına bak. Yirmi adım öteden dümen kokusu alıp gelmiş." {n}Merovlu, sinirle dilini şaklatıyor.{/n} "Uçsuza kadar yolu var."

languages.text: "Verdammter Bluthund. Riecht er eine Intrige aus zwanzig Schritten Entfernung?" {n}Der Merovianer schnalzt verärgert mit der Zunge.{/n} "Tja, zur Leere mit ihm."
languages.original_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."

traits.locale_text: "Verdammter Bluthund. Riecht er eine Intrige aus zwanzig Schritten Entfernung?" {n}Der Merovianer schnalzt verärgert mit der Zunge.{/n} "Tja, zur Leere mit ihm."

languages.text: 「呪われた猟犬め。二十歩離れたところから陰謀を嗅ぎ分けられるとでも？」{n}メロヴィアン人は苛立たしげに舌を鳴らす。{/n}「ふん、奴など虚空に堕ちるがいい。」
languages.original_text: "Damned bloodhound. Can he sniff out a scheme at twenty paces?" {n}The Merovian clicks his tongue in irritation.{/n} "Well, to the void with him."
